title: Add comprehensive telemetry for cross-impl debugging
description:
The heterogeneous mesh testing (ec2-hetero-fleet.sh) needs proper telemetry to debug interop failures. Currently logging is sparse and inconsistent across implementations.

Requirements:
1. Every TX/RX logged with: timestamp, packet hex, length, RSSI/SNR (RX only)
2. Structured JSON metrics per node: tx_count, rx_count, unique_peers, errors
3. Pcap capture for wire-level Wireshark analysis
4. Cross-impl packet tracking: hash each packet so we can verify 'Python sent X, Rust received X'

This epic covers all three implementations: Python, Rust, Zephyr C.
